summary: Testing Daily Briefing (VIP Hub) and Feedback Page features. Backend: 11/11 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All tested features working correctly - Daily Briefing displays AI-generated market data, Feedback page submits successfully, Profile Help Us link navigates to /feedback, Login button works.
critical_code_review_comments: Daily Briefing in VIP Hub loads correctly with AI-generated content including: market summary, BTC/ETH prices with 24h change, Fear & Greed index, Bitcoin analysis, Ethereum analysis, Key Events list, Opportunity and Risk Alert sections

Feedback page at /feedback has all required elements: hero section, 4 feedback types (testimonial/improvement/bug/feature), 5-star rating for testimonials, message input with 2000 char limit, Send button, privacy note
Feedback API POST /api/feedback stores data in MongoDB with user info and timestamps
Profile page has 'Help Us' menu item that navigates to /feedback page
Login button fix verified: Uses View with backgroundColor instead of LinearGradient to fix web click propagation
English translations for feedback page working correctly (Help Us Improve, Your testimonials matter, etc.)
seed_data_creation: Test feedback records created during testing (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Daily Briefing and Feedback features both working. Daily Briefing uses GPT-4o for AI generation with 4-hour cache. Feedback API requires authentication. Profile page /feedback link uses router.push('/feedback'). Login button uses View instead of LinearGradient for web compatibility.

tests_performed.test: Backend: Daily briefing has market data (BTC/ETH prices)
Frontend: Login page loads and button works
Frontend: VIP Hub loads with Briefing tab default
Frontend: Daily Briefing shows sentiment, prices, analysis
Frontend: Feedback page renders all elements
Frontend: Feedback submission shows success message
Frontend: Profile Help Us link navigates to /feedback
